Title: Verify User Registration
Test Data:
- Valid username: testuser
- Valid password: testpassword
- Valid name: Test User
- Valid email: testuser@example.com
Test Steps:
1. Call `registerUser()` with the provided user data.
2. Verify that the user data is saved in the Users Database.

Title: Verify Invalid User Registration
Test Data:
- Invalid username: testuser123
- Valid password: testpassword
- Valid name: Test User
- Valid email: testuser@example.com
Test Steps:
1. Call `registerUser()` with the provided user data.
2. Verify that the user registration fails due to an invalid username.

Title: Verify User Login
Test Data:
- Valid email: testuser@example.com
- Valid password: testpassword
Test Steps:
1. Call `userLogin(email, password)`.
2. Verify that the user is validated successfully.
3. Verify that the user is logged in.

Title: Verify Invalid User Login
Test Data:
- Invalid email: testuserinvalid@example.com
- Valid password: testpassword
Test Steps:
1. Call `userLogin(email, password)`.
2. Verify that the user is not validated.
3. Verify that the user is not logged in.

Title: Create a New Trip
Test Data:
- City: New York
- Country: USA
- Final Date: 2023-12-31
Test Steps:
1. Call `createTrip(city, country, finalDate)` as a logged-in user.
2. Verify that a new trip is created with the provided data.
Expected Result: A new trip is created successfully.

Title: Retrieve Trip Information
Test Steps:
1. Call `getTrip()` for an existing trip.
2. Verify that the trip information is returned correctly.
Expected Result: The trip information is returned correctly.

Title: Create a New Plan
Test Steps:
1. Call `createPlan()` as a logged-in user.
2. Verify that a new plan is created.
Expected Result: A new plan is created successfully.

Title: Create a New Daily Plan
Test Steps:
1. Call `createDailyPlan(weather)` for an existing plan.
2. Verify that a new daily plan is created with the provided weather data.
Expected Result: A new daily plan is created successfully.

Title: Create a New Category
Test Steps:
1. Call `createCategory(name)` as a logged-in user.
2. Verify that a new category is created with the provided name.
Expected Result: A new category is created successfully.

Title: Create a New Place to Visit
Test Data:
- Name: Statue of Liberty
- Category: Attractions
Test Steps:
1. Call `createPlaceToVisit(name, category)` for an existing category.
2. Verify that a new place to visit is created with the provided name and category.
Expected Result: A new place to visit is created successfully.

Title: Add a Place to Visit to a Trip
Preconditions: A trip exists and a place to visit exists.
Test Data: - Place to Visit: Statue of Liberty
Test Steps:
1. Call `addPlaceToVisit(placeToVisit)` for an existing trip.
2. Verify that the place to visit is added to the trip.
Expected Result: The place to visit is added to the trip successfully.

Title: Retrieve Trip Details
Test Steps:
1. Call `getTrip()` for an existing trip.
2. Verify that the trip details are returned correctly.
Expected Result: The trip details are returned correctly.

Title: Update User Profile
Test Data:
- New Name: Updated Test User
- New Email: updatedtestuser@example.com
Test Steps:
1. Call `changeProfile()`.
2. Provide the new user data.
3. Verify that the user profile is updated successfully.
Expected Result: The user profile is updated successfully.

Title: Retrieve Updated User Profile
Test Steps:
1. Call `getUserProfile()`.
2. Verify that the updated user profile is returned correctly.
Expected Result: The updated user profile is returned correctly.
